productDisplayName: Clarks Women Henderson Toy Bone Leather White Flats
description: clarks have combined quality, classic elegance and iconic ideas to create a sophisticated version of the moccasin shoe, perfect for the woman who wants to express her femininity while projecting a fashionable image to the world.  You can rely on Clarks to provide a shoe which will take care of your feet, giving comfort, good quality and a great British eye for style. Work the look with a formal shirt from arrow and tailored pants, or for laid-back city chic, wear this with tonal shorts, a slim leather belt and a semi-formal shirt.UpperLeather upper with slip-on stylSoft lining and padded sockliner for instep comfortRuffled stitch detail at the seams of the toe boxTassel embellishment above the mouthReinforced overlay the heel collar for ankle supportOutsoleNon-slip TPU outsole with grooves on the forefoot and rearfoot and a short stacked heelShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
